name: Apetit Oyj
summary: Apetit Oyj operates as a food company primarily in Finland, Norway, Germany, Sweden, and internationally. It operates through Food Solutions, Oilseed Products, and Grain Trade segments. The company develops, produces, markets, and sells frozen vegetables, foods, and pizzas under the Apetit brand name; vegetable and rapeseed oils, and other oilseed products; and grains, oilseeds, and raw materials for feeds. It also offers burgers and nuggets, frozen pizzas, granites, and arctic peas, as well as fish based ready food products; and manufactures various products for private labels. The company also exports its products. It serves retailers, food service sector, and food and animal feed industries, as well as. the hotel, restaurant, and catering sector. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
